notes: PLATFORM: 10054 shares core drivetrain (Cummins QSF3.8) with 10042 and 8042. Longer boom distinguishes 10054 from 10042 (42 ft vs 54 ft lift height). NOTE: pre-lock registry entries incorrectly referenced hydrostatic transmission for this model; OEM spec sheet (Part No. 3132404, R011808) confirms T4F powershift. All hydrostatic references in source_refs for this record are superseded.
lift_capacity_lb: 10,000 lb — confirmed by shared platform and model designation. HIGH.
max_lift_height_ft: 54 ft — encoded in model number. HIGH. Verify exact figure (may be 54.0 or 54.2 ft) against OEM spec sheet.

fuel_capacity_gal: 35 gal — explicitly confirmed on 10054 OEM sheet per skytrak_10042 registry notes: 'fuel_capacity 35 gal consistent with shared SkyTrak platform (confirmed on 8042 and 10054 from OEM sheets)'. HIGH.
engine_hp SOFT: 74 hp (DEF-free Cummins QSF3.8) is standard NA-market config, same as 10042. 10054L variant available with 110 hp. Registry pins to 74 hp standard; package_dependent.
max_forward_reach_ft null: 10054 has longer boom than 10042 (28.5 ft); estimated ~37 ft based on geometry but not confirmed from OEM sheet. Set null / manual_review.
operating_weight_lb null: Expected higher than 10042 (27,150 lb) due to longer boom. Not confirmed from OEM sheet. Set null / manual_review.
travel_speed_mph: 19.0 mph consistent with shared SkyTrak platform. MEDIUM — confirm against OEM sheet.
REGISTRY ORIGIN: New record — 10054 was previously mapped to skytrak_10042. Distinct machine: longer boom, same capacity, different geometry.
operating_weight_lb = 31,500 lb. HIGH/locked - JLG OEM SkyTrak 10054 operation/safety manual lists maximum operating weight (no attachment) as 31,500 lb.

max_forward_reach_ft = 38.75 ft. HIGH/locked - JLG OEM SkyTrak 10054 product page lists maximum reach of 38 ft 9 in. Lift height (54.0 ft class) and forward reach are distinct specifications and are stored separately.

JLG/SkyTrak OEM spec sheet, Part No. 3132404, R011808. Generation: T4F_powershift. REGISTRY CORRECTIONS: prior entry had hydrostatic (wrong), 74hp (wrong), 31,500lb OW (wrong). OEM supersedes. transmission_type = powershift is OEM-confirmed and locked.

OEM LOCK NOTE: Pre-lock hydrostatic reference (v2 registry cross-reference) was annotated as superseded in source_refs 2026-04-13. OEM confirmation via Part No. 3132404, R011808 establishes powershift as the definitive transmission type for this model.

merge_notes: 2026-03-24: Promoted from staging — skytrak_10054, skytrak_8042. Both records are spec_confidence=MEDIUM with HIGH-confidence core fields (lift_capacity_lb, max_lift_height_ft, fuel_capacity_gal confirmed from OEM sheets). Guard passes. operating_weight_lb and max_forward_reach_ft still null — manual_review required before lock.
OEM lock 2026-03-25: genie_gth_844 promoted from staging. Full 2023 Genie spec sheet. max_lift_height corrected 44.0->43.83 ft. max_forward_reach locked 28.17 ft. spec_confidence->HIGH.

Performance lock pass v3.1 2026-04-09: 11 JCB telehandler models written with OEM-PDF-confirmed 5-field performance specs (lift_capacity_lbs, max_lift_height_ft, max_forward_reach_ft, lift_capacity_at_full_height_lbs, lift_capacity_at_full_reach_lbs). 7 models skipped (null fields / missing source_pdf / non-high confidence).

Powertrain lock pass v3.2 2026-04-09: 16 models written (horsepower_hp, engine_manufacturer, transmission_type, operating_weight_lbs, drive_type). 7 models skipped (null confidence). Special rule: horsepower_hp suppressed for jcb_507_42. Engine manufacturers normalized to JCB/Perkins.
SkyTrak OEM lock pass v3.3 2026-04-09: 4 records updated, 4 records created. Held: SkyTrak 8042 (2024_hydrostatic), SkyTrak 6042 (2023_hydrostatic). Prior JCB powertrain lock (v3.2) preserved.

Schema cleanup pass v3.4 2026-04-09: Removed legacy duplicate field names (lift_capacity_lb, engine_brand, engine_hp, operating_weight_lb) from 4 legacy SkyTrak records. 9 new-convention core fields retained as source of truth. Non-core extras (fuel_capacity_gal, travel_speed_mph, steering_modes, fuel_type) preserved.

Schema lock pass v3.4 2026-04-09: All 8 SkyTrak records confirmed clean. 9 new-convention core fields locked as source of truth. Legacy duplicate fields (lift_capacity_lb, engine_brand, engine_hp, operating_weight_lb) confirmed absent. Non-core extras (fuel_capacity_gal, travel_speed_mph, steering_modes, fuel_type) preserved on 4 legacy records. JCB records untouched.

OEM lock 2026-04-10 (_apply_jlg_oem_lock_v4_1): 5 JLG G-series records corrected (engine, capacity, weight); 8 new JLG records added (519, 742, 943, 1055, 1255, 1644, AG925, 6042). All single-source OEM locked.

Schema standardization pass v3.5 2026-04-13: Migrated all legacy field names to canonical across 22 records (all manufacturers). Renamed: lift_capacity_lb->lift_capacity_lbs, engine_brand->engine_manufacturer, engine_hp->horsepower_hp, operating_weight_lb->operating_weight_lbs, lift_capacity_at_max_height_lb->lift_capacity_at_full_height_lbs, lift_capacity_at_max_reach_lb->lift_capacity_at_full_reach_lbs. jcb_509_42: legacy duplicates dropped (canonical values from v3.2 preserved). 23 records (14 JCB + 8 SkyTrak + 1 Genie recent) already canonical — untouched. Zero legacy field names remain in registry.

JCB OEM core spec patch v3.6 2026-04-13: Applied canonical fields to 15 JCB records (36 field writes, 21 fields held). NEW fields: jcb_507_42 (lift_capacity_lbs, max_lift_height_ft, max_forward_reach_ft, lift_capacity_at_full_height_lbs, horsepower_hp), jcb_509_42 (lift_capacity_at_full_height_lbs), jcb_510_56 and jcb_512_56 (lift_capacity_lbs, max_lift_height_ft, max_forward_reach_ft, lift_capacity_at_full_height_lbs), jcb_540_170 (lift_capacity_lbs, max_lift_height_ft, max_forward_reach_ft, lift_capacity_at_full_height_lbs). Rounding corrections on jcb_525_60, jcb_531_70, jcb_535_95, jcb_535_125, jcb_535_140, jcb_541_70, jcb_540_140, jcb_540_180. HELD: horsepower_hp on jcb_506_36/509_42/510_56/512_56/520_40/535_140/540_140; reach/weight/capacity conflicts on jcb_509_42/520_40/525_60/535_95/535_140/541_70/540_140; engine_manufacturer conflict on jcb_520_40 (Perkins vs JCB).
